Main Color:Green

Length (in.):54.00

Product Features

  • Unique features: The sofa is equipped with armrests and backrests. The height and shape of the armrests are carefully designed, taking into account the body structure and activity habits of big and oversized dogs, allowing pets to relax and rest in the most comfortable position. The presence of the backrest provides strong support for pets' backs and necks, helping them maintain the correct posture and reduce body fatigue.
  • Short sofa leg design: The short leg design makes the sofa more stable, not easy to shake, even if large and medium dogs can maintain a stable movement on it. At the same time, the lower height allows pets to easily get on and off the sofa, reducing the accidental injury they may cause due to jumping. Moreover, this design style complements the overall modern elegant style, creating a simple and sophisticated feeling, making the sofa more functional as well as beautiful.
  • Durability Meets Comfort：The sofa is upholstered in high - quality linen fabric. Linen is renowned for its breathability, ensuring your pet stays cool even on warm days. It's also incredibly durable, able to withstand the claws and antics of your active pet, making it a long - lasting addition to your home.
  • Cute and Comfortable Pet Furniture: This dog bed is truly a piece of furniture; just like a smaller sofa for your pets; While you lounge on the couch, your pet can use their own sofa and be calm and take comfort in their own space.
